open_issues_detail.title: [FR] Only search for missing songs from artists with a given tag
Questions : difference between Uploaded and session_uploaded and Enhancement for already downloaded file.
Most releases found are missing tracks
Got this message after trying to enable it (Gnome45):
Track Format & FFMPEG not adding metadata
Issue with Lidarr recognizing downloaded audio and incorrect metadata in Jellyfin
Causes my IP to be blocked

non_actionable_summary.critical_blocker: Telegram notification step in dispatch.yaml blocks ALL Dependabot PRs
non_actionable_summary.notes:
All 3 CI failures + 8 blocked PRs require profile repo changes:
  1. sodarr-chrome-plugin: dispatch.yaml workflow design (path filter)
  2. tado-gnome-shell-extension: External GNOME Extensions API issue
  3. bin: setup.py needs TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN distribution
  4. **CRITICAL**: dispatch.yaml 'Notify Telegram pipeline started' needs continue-on-error: true (blocks 8 PRs)

next_iteration_strategy.priority_1: **URGENT**: Fix dispatch.yaml Telegram notification step to unblock 8 Dependabot PRs

dispatch_yaml_improvements.issue: **CRITICAL** Telegram notification step blocks Dependabot PRs
dispatch_yaml_improvements.suggestion: Add 'continue-on-error: true' to 'Notify Telegram pipeline started' step in pipeline-start job
dispatch_yaml_improvements.impact: Would unblock 8 current security update PRs and prevent future Dependabot PR blocks
dispatch_yaml_improvements.fix:
In dispatch.yaml pipeline-start job, change:
  - name: Notify Telegram pipeline started
    continue-on-error: true  # <-- ADD THIS
    run: ...

dispatch_yaml_improvements.suggestion: Adjust path filter to trigger chrome-build when chrome-plugin/ dir exists
